heading: Fix the Immediate Problem
body:
- Check the cluster's metrics to determine if there are
  sufficient compute resources for your workload.

  - If the cluster is exhausting CPU, disk IOPS, connections, or other
    resources, scale to a cluster that supports your workload.

  - If the cluster's metrics are normal, there could be a network issue
    with the cloud provider. Atlas automatically attempts to repair
    these issues. If the problem persists, [contact MongoDB Support](https://www.mongodb.com/contact).
